_schema: v0.1 REVERSIBLE — candidates for ABSTRACT TERM (lexical presence, NOT verdict). Default settings; not a permanent schema. The judgment of whether a candidate is an illusory abstract idea that conceals a normative/metaphysical definition remains INDUCTIVE.
_note: Berkeleyan critique of abstract ideas (Treatise, Intro §§7-25): a general term that claims to name a determinate thing without particular/ostensible content is where normative stipulations and metaphysical posits hide. Here, candidates are surfaced via morphology (nominalizations) + curated lexicon. Over-generates by design: the LLM filters based on O.
_updateability: metaphysical_terms is EXPANDIBLE: terms are promoted via inductive.promuovi_termine() (feedback loop or user request). concealment_taxonomy is UPDATEABLE: add/rename entries here, the prompts read it from here. Nothing is permanent in the code.

tassonomia_occultamento.desc: the term has a particular/ostensible referent -> NOT an illusory abstraction
dissolves into a prescriptive definition ('X is what ought to...')
names a posited entity without ostensive content
the chain ends in an ostensive gesture / shared use (Berkeley->Wittgenstein)

suffissi_nominalizzanti.nota: reality, objectivity, truth, identity — high precision
